description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Suite that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: tests, docs, and quality. The tests job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checking out the repo, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and running tox. The docs and quality jobs run on ubuntu-latest, checking out the repo, setting up Python 3.8, installing dependencies, and running tox for docs and quality respectively.
